decision_commentary: All required schema fields present: channel (email), message_body (bilingual — both es and en), project_reference (PRJ-2026-0317-familia-reyes-montoya), status (draft — correct, awaiting Marcela approval before send). Message is complete: project name in subject context, full proposal context, and clear action requested ('Si desean avanzar, pueden respondernos con Aprobamos'). Channel is email — correct for formal deliverable/proposal delivery. Brand voice is excellent — warm, design-engaged, references the specific design concept ('ese borde entre la vegetación y el mar'), professional without being cold. SEMARNAT timeline note accurately included in both language versions. State sync scored 5 — status is 'draft' indicating proper hold-for-approval workflow, and Gmail thread 19cff1532ce051b0 confirmed as client_proposal_thread_id in state.json. Next step for client is unambiguous. No confidential internal information included. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
celia_routing_notes: Celia DG-06 routing checked in separate scorecard.
